<!-- Reels không cần body content. Chỉ cần frontmatter + thumbnail là đủ.
     Click vào reel sẽ mở modal embed video từ FB / TikTok / YouTube Shorts.

     URL hỗ trợ:
     - YouTube Shorts: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/XXX
     - Facebook Reel:  https://www.facebook.com/reel/XXX
     - TikTok:         https://www.tiktok.com/@user/video/XXX
     - Instagram Reel: https://www.instagram.com/reel/XXX -->
